name: release_proof_and_public_naming
outcome_goal: Package one replayable release proof with explicit residual risks and sweep the remaining public dispatch-era naming from outward-facing surfaces.
anti_requirements: Do not call the system release-ready without a replayable proof packet.
Do not keep public docs and help text speaking a dead dispatch dialect.
Do not hide residual risks in chat summaries.

jobs.label: release_proof_packet
jobs.prompt: Assemble one replayable release proof with explicit commands, evidence paths, and residual-risk accounting. It should be possible to rerun the proof without remembering this chat.

jobs.label: public_naming_cleanup
jobs.prompt: Sweep remaining public dispatch-era naming from docs, outward-facing help text, artifacts, and operator read models. Preserve compatibility only where the repo still has a real runtime contract behind the words.
